case_title: DOMINION, THERESA vs. MANN, KIN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINION, THERESA AS TO DEFENDANT MANN, KIN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-19-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-02-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINION, THERESA SERVED MAY-27-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANN, KIN

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY JAMES L CARTER. HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINION, THERESA

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-29-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY JAMES L CARTER. HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $113.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MANN, KIN
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-10-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY JAMES L CARTER. HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-22-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY JAMES L. CARTER FOR FAILURE TO FILE STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A NEW STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-06-1998 CONTINUED FROM JAN-22-1998 TO MAR-11-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOMINION, THERESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANN, KIN $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,835.49 INTEREST, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,948.49
